title: Middle Eastern Beef Kebabs
description: A flavorful and spicy dish originating from the Middle East, perfect for summer grilling.

ingredients.name: Beef cubes
ingredients.notes: use sirloin or ribeye for best results

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and paprika.
Add beef cubes to the bowl and mix well to coat.
Thread beef and vegetables onto skewers, leaving space for even cooking.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes, turning occasionally, until beef reaches 63°C (145°F).
Transfer kebabs to a plate and let rest for 2-3 minutes.
Serve with tzatziki sauce and pita bread, if desired.
